meaning: n.塞尔维亚人[语]adj.塞尔维亚的,塞尔维亚人[语]的
examples: It is a common refrain in the Serbian enclaves.
At school they have always been taught in Serbian.
In fact lots of Serbian jobs depend on the Kosovo export trade.
Yugoslav international defender Nisa Saveljic has been detained by Serbian police for allegedly avoiding military service.
Pushing himself away from the table, he mumbled something, in Serbian, to a female handler off-screen.
